Class VerifyWorkspaceMojo

java.lang.Object
org.apache.maven.plugin.AbstractMojo
network.ike.plugin.ws.VerifyWorkspaceMojo
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.apache.maven.plugin.ContextEnabled, org.apache.maven.plugin.Mojo
@Mojo(name="verify", requiresProject=false, threadSafe=true) public class VerifyWorkspaceMojo extends org.apache.maven.plugin.AbstractMojo
Verify workspace manifest consistency and subproject git state.

Checks that all dependency references resolve, no cycles exist, all group members are valid, and all component types are defined. Also reports subproject git state, Syncthing health, and environment presence. 

mvn ike:verify

  • Field Summary

  • Method Details

    • execute

      public void execute() throws org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException
      Throws:
      org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException

    • loadGraph

      protected network.ike.workspace.WorkspaceGraph loadGraph() throws org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException
      Load the manifest and build the workspace graph.
      Returns:
      the workspace dependency graph
      Throws:
      org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException - if the manifest cannot be read

    • resolveManifest

      protected Path resolveManifest() throws org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException
      Resolve the manifest path — explicit parameter, or search upward.
      Returns:
      path to the workspace manifest file
      Throws:
      org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException - if the manifest cannot be found

    • workspaceRoot

      protected File workspaceRoot() throws org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException
      Resolve the workspace root directory (parent of workspace.yaml).
      Returns:
      the workspace root directory
      Throws:
      org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException - if the manifest cannot be found

    • gitStatus

      protected String gitStatus(File componentDir)
      Run git status --porcelain on a component directory and return the output (empty string = clean).
      Parameters:
      componentDir - the component directory to check
      Returns:
      git status output, empty if clean

    • gitBranch

      protected String gitBranch(File componentDir)
      Get the current branch of a component directory.
      Parameters:
      componentDir - the component directory to check
      Returns:
      the current branch name

    • gitShortSha

      protected String gitShortSha(File componentDir)
      Get the short SHA of HEAD for a component directory.
      Parameters:
      componentDir - the component directory to check
      Returns:
      the short SHA of HEAD

    • isWorkspaceMode

      protected boolean isWorkspaceMode()
      Check whether a workspace.yaml exists in the directory hierarchy. Does not throw — returns false if no manifest is found.
      Returns:
      true if running inside a workspace, false for a bare repo

    • requireParam

      protected String requireParam(String currentValue, String propertyName, String promptLabel) throws org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException
      Prompt the user interactively for a required parameter when it was not supplied on the command line.

      Uses System.console() so that IntelliJ run configs and terminal sessions can provide values without requiring placeholder -D properties. Falls back to a clear error message when running non-interactively (e.g., piped input).

      Parameters:
      currentValue - the value from the @Parameter field (may be null)
      propertyName - the -D property name (for the error message)
      promptLabel - human-readable label shown in the prompt
      Returns:
      the resolved value — either the original or user-supplied
      Throws:
      org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException - if no value can be obtained

    • workspaceName

      protected String workspaceName()
      Read the workspace name from the root POM's artifactId. Falls back to "Workspace" if the POM cannot be read.

    • header

      protected String header(String goalName)
      Format a goal header line using the workspace name. Example: "komet-ws — Status"

    • appendReport

      protected void appendReport(String goalName, String content)
      Append a section to the cumulative workspace report.

      Thread-safe — uses file-level locking. The report accumulates in target/ws-report.md and is removed by mvn clean.

      Parameters:
      goalName - the goal that produced this output (e.g., "ws:add")
      content - markdown content to append

    • startReport

      protected network.ike.plugin.ws.ReportLog startReport()
      Start capturing info-level log output for the workspace report. Replaces the Mojo's logger with a tee that captures info output. Call finishReport(String, ReportLog) at the end of execute() to write the captured output to the report file.
      Returns:
      a ReportLog that wraps the original logger and captures info output

    • finishReport

      protected void finishReport(String goalName, network.ike.plugin.ws.ReportLog reportLog)
      Write captured log output to the workspace report file.
      Parameters:
      goalName - the goal name for the report section header
      reportLog - the ReportLog from startReport()
